headline: On Holding shakes up leadership team in response to rising pressure, says Jefferies
summary: Jefferies has reiterated its ‘Underperform’ rating on shoemaker On Holding (NYSE:ANON) after the company announced a leadership overhaul that will see co-founders David Allemann and Caspar Coppetti take on dual roles as executive co-chairmen and co-CEOs, while current CEO Martin Hoffmann...
